floor.translate: этаж, пол, настил, перекрытие, напольный, справляться
mnemonic: floor [фло:] пол, этаж - На полу на весь этаж (фу-фло) разное валяется.

floor [flɔ: ]
***
ПОЛ - какое- то фуфло. (это) floor
НАСТЕЛИЛ на пол фуфло. (это) floor

examples.eng: Water covered the floor.
The floor was level.
Please sweep the floor.
We took the lift to the tenth floor.
examples.ru: Мы поехали на десятый этаж на лифте.

examples.eng: He lay flat on the floor.
I found a shilling on the floor.
The news just floored me.
Lie flat on the floor.
He lay dead on the floor.
Don't walk on the wet floor!
The book fell onto the floor.
The floor was completely sound.
What is that thing on the floor?
examples.ru: Что это за штука на полу?

examples.eng: I gave the floor a good scrub.
Keep your feet on the floor.
The floor was stacked with boxes.
Clothes littered the floor.
The car was on the top floor.
The sands which floor the sea.
He's never going to get floored.
Water poured all over the floor.
examples.ru: Вода залила весь пол. / Вода разлилась по всему полу.

examples.eng: the floor of a car
The cellar has a dirt floor.
Give the floor a good scour.
He shuffled across the floor.
I rode up to the tenth floor.
examples.ru: Я поднялся на лифте до десятого этажа.

examples.eng: Dig your foot into the floor.
Water was splashing on the floor.
a chasm in the ocean floor
The floor is lifting slowly.
examples.ru: Пол потихоньку поднимается. (т.е. коробится, деформируется от влаги или давления)
